name: Shahed-136
description: Iranian one-way attack drone (loitering munition) designed for massed saturation strikes against infrastructure and military targets. Extremely cheap to produce and launched in swarms to overwhelm air defenses.

specialAbilities.name: Swarm Saturation Attack
specialAbilities.description: Launched in large salvos to overwhelm enemy air defense systems through sheer numbers, exhausting interceptor stocks.

specialAbilities.name: Expendable Platform
specialAbilities.description: Single-use design means every unit is consumed on attack, but extreme low cost enables mass procurement.
